Describe what is happening at the stovetop.
canonical_answer: A black pot with two side handles sits on the front right burner of a white electric stovetop. A hand pours yellow liquid from a small white bowl into the pot using a spoon. A hand holds a large glass bowl filled with shredded orange carrots above the pot. The brand name Hotpoint is visible on the stove's black control panel.

question: Describe the sequence of scenes shown in the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a finished orange dessert topped with nuts is displayed; at 6s, a large bowl of shredded carrots appears surrounded by smaller bowls; at 16s, a close-up shows a glass measuring cup filled with white liquid next to the carrot bowl.

question: Outline the visual changes occurring from the beginning to the end of the clip.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the dish labeled Gajar Halwa is presented with text overlay; at 6s, raw shredded carrots and various liquid ingredients are arranged on the counter; at 16s, a glass jug of milk is highlighted beside the carrot bowl.
